mapper.select: select g.name as gymName, u.tel as gymTel, u.created_at as regDate, ifnull(count(distinct c.id),0) as gymClientCount, ifnull(sum(p.payment_price*0.9),0) as gymCal from gym g left join user u on(g.user_id=u.id) left join client c on(g.id=c.gym_id) left join trainer t on(g.id=t.gym_id) left join payment p on(p.user_num=g.user_id) group by g.name, u.tel, u.created_at order by g.name

select t.name as trainerName, u.tel as trainerTel, u.created_at as regDate, ifnull(count(distinct c.id),0) as trainerClientCount, ifnull(sum(p.payment_price*0.9),0) as trainerCal from trainer t left join user u on(t.user_id=u.id) left join client c on(t.id=c.trainer_id) left join payment p on(p.user_num=t.user_id) group by t.name, u.tel, u.created_at order by t.name

select c.name as clientName, u.tel as clientTel, u.created_at as regDate, c.trainer_id as ptTrainer, ifnull(sum(p.payment_price),0) as payment from client c left join user u on(c.user_id=u.id) left join payment p on(p.user_num=c.user_id) group by c.name, u.tel, u.created_at, c.trainer_id order by c.name

select g.name as gymName, u.tel as gymTel, u.created_at as regDate, ifnull(count(distinct c.id),0) as gymClientCount, ifnull(sum(p.payment_price*0.9),0) as gymCal from gym g left join user u on(g.user_id=u.id) left join client c on(g.id=c.gym_id) left join trainer t on(g.id=t.gym_id) left join payment p on(p.user_num=g.user_id) group by g.name, u.tel, u.created_at order by g.name limit #{row}, #{pageRow}

select t.name as trainerName, u.tel as trainerTel, u.created_at as regDate, ifnull(count(distinct c.id),0) as trainerClientCount, ifnull(sum(p.payment_price*0.9),0) as trainerCal from trainer t left join user u on(t.user_id=u.id) left join client c on(t.id=c.trainer_id) left join payment p on(p.user_num=t.user_id) group by t.name, u.tel, u.created_at order by t.name limit #{row}, #{pageRow}

select c.name as clientName, u.tel as clientTel, u.created_at as regDate, c.trainer_id as ptTrainer, ifnull(sum(p.payment_price),0) as payment from client c left join user u on(c.user_id=u.id) left join payment p on(p.user_num=c.user_id) group by c.name, u.tel, u.created_at, c.trainer_id order by c.name limit #{row}, #{pageRow}
